ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant (Male/Female/Other) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant in years */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index of the participant */,
  "egfr" REAL /* Estimated Glomerular Filtration Rate */,
  "tercile" TEXT /* eGFR tercile (High, Medium, Low) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the participant */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Relevant medical history of the participant */,
  "diabetes" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant has diabetes */,
  "hypertension" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant has hypertension */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the participant (e.g., Non-Smoker, Former Smoker, Current Smoker) */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption habits of the participant (e.g., None, Light, Moderate, Heavy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial's objective */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trial (e.g., Active, Completed, On Hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial associated with the measurement */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant for whom the measurement is taken */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "egfr" REAL /* Estimated Glomerular Filtration Rate at the time of measurement */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index at the time of measurement */,
  "systolic_bp" INTEGER /* Systolic blood pressure */,
  "diastolic_bp" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure */,
  "creatinine_level" REAL /* Serum creatinine level */,
  "urine_protein" REAL /* Urine protein level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "egfr_terciles" (
  "tercile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eGFR tercile */,
  "tercile_name" TEXT /* Name of the tercile (High, Medium, Low) */,
  "egfr_range" TEXT /* Range of eGFR values for the tercile */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the tercile */,
  "clinical_significance" TEXT /* Clinical significance of the tercile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tercile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for demographic data entry */,
  "total_participants" INTEGER /* Total number of participants in the trial */,
  "male_count" INTEGER /* Count of male participants */,
  "female_count" INTEGER /* Count of female participants */,
  "avg_age" REAL /* Average age of participants */,
  "avg_bmi" REAL /* Average BMI of participants */,
  "ethnicity_count" TEXT /* Count of participants by ethnicity */,
  "diabetes_count" INTEGER /* Count of participants with diabetes */,
  "hypertension_count" INTEGER /* Count of participants with hypertension */,
  "smoking_status_count" TEXT /* Count of participants by smoking status */,
  "alcohol_consumption_count" TEXT /* Count of participants by alcohol consumption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consent_forms" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consent form */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant who signed the consent */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when the consent was signed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the consent (e.g., Signed, Pending) */,
  "consent_type" TEXT /* Type of consent (e.g., General, Specific for a particular aspect) */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date if the participant withdraws consent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consent_forms_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adverse_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the adverse event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant who reported the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the adverse event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "seriousness" TEXT /* Seriousness of the event (e.g., Mild, Moderate, Severe) */,
  "related_to_study" INTEGER /* Indicates if the adverse event is related to the study */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up is required */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of any required follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adverse_events_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the document */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial associated with the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance document (e.g., Protocol, Safety Report) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the document was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_documents_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistical analysis */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial associated with the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., ANOVA, Regression) */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value resulting from the analysis */,
  "result_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the results from the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst who performed the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_analysis_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Researcher, Admin, Clinician) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., View, Edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant providing the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was completed */,
  "survey_data" TEXT /* JSON data containing the responses to the survey */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., Pre-Study, Post-Study) */,
  "survey_version" TEXT /* Version of the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
